memberdef.name: InPartyMemberStatus

detaileddescription.para: Interface that owns this party instance, used to fire delegates on member changes
String representing the token that is sent to users to invite them to the party
Configuration used to set up the party
Map of users that are currently in this party
Array of user IDs representing players that we have invited to this party
Instance of party data that is grabbed from the backend and modified locally

memberdef.argsstring: (const TSharedRef< FOnlinePartySystemAccelByte, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > &InOwningInterface, const FString &InPartyId, const FString &InInviteToken, const FPartyConfiguration &InPartyConfiguration, const TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser > &InLeaderId, const TSharedRef< FOnlinePartyData > &InPartyData=MakeShared< FOnlinePartyData >(), const FOnlinePartyTypeId InPartyTypeId=FOnlinePartyTypeId(static_cast< uint32 >(EAccelBytePartyType::PRIMARY_PARTY)))
memberdef.name: FOnlinePartyAccelByte

detaileddescription.para: Method to get the amount of members that are currently in this party;
#SG Adds the specified user's crossplay preference and platform to the party's storage.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser > &LocalUserId, const TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser > &UserToRemove)
memberdef.name: RemovePlayerCrossplayPreferenceAndPlatform

detaileddescription.para: #SG Removes the specified user's crossplay preference and platform from the party's storage.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser > &LocalUserId, const FString &TicketId, const FString &MatchId)
memberdef.name: AddPlayerAcceptedTicketId

detaileddescription.para: #TICKETID Adds the specified Leader TicketID to the party's storage.
#TICKETID Removes the specified Leader TicketID from the party's storage.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser > &LocalUserId, const TSharedRef< FOnlinePartyMemberAccelByte > &Member)
memberdef.name: AddMember

detaileddescription.para: Internal method for interface and async tasks to add members to this party object

memberdef.argsstring: (const TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser > &LocalUserId, const TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser > &InviterUserId, const TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser > &InvitedUserId)
memberdef.name: AddUserToInvitedPlayers

detaileddescription.para: Internal method for interface and async tasks to add players that have been invited to this party
Method internally for interface and other tasks to get a member of this party by their ID

memberdef.argsstring: (const TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser > &LocalUserId, const TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser > &RemovedUserId, const EMemberExitedReason &ExitReason)
memberdef.name: RemoveMember

detaileddescription.para: Internal method to remove a party member from a party, usually used in notifications or on kick

memberdef.argsstring: (const TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser > &LocalUserId, const TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser > &InvitedUserId, const EPartyInvitationRemovedReason &PartyInviteRemoveReason)
memberdef.name: RemoveInvite

detaileddescription.para: Internal method to remove a party invite by the invited user ID
Internal method for getting an array of all current party members
Internal method for getting an array of user IDs for all players with currently pending invites
Internal method for getting a reference to our party data
Internal method to update party data
Internal method to set party code associated with this party instance
Check whether this party is a crossplay enabled party or not. This will check the preferences of all members to see if their crossplay flag is enabled.

simplesect.para: true if all members have crossplay enabled, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Gets an array of the unique platforms that each party member is on

memberdef.argsstring: (const TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser > LocalUserId, const TSharedRef< FOnlinePartySystemAccelByte, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > PartyInterface, const FAccelByteModelsInfoPartyResponse &PartyInfo, const TArray< TSharedRef< FAccelByteUserInfo > > &PartyMemberInfo, const TSharedRef< FOnlinePartyData > &InPartyData=MakeShared< FOnlinePartyData >(), const FString &PartyCode=TEXT(""), const FAccelByteModelsBulkUserStatusNotif &InPartyMemberStatus=FAccelByteModelsBulkUserStatusNotif())
memberdef.name: CreatePartyFromPartyInfo

detaileddescription.para: Internal method to construct a party instance from an AccelByte party info structure as well as a map of user IDs to display names for each member of the party.
Representation of a party on the AccelByte backend
